channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Hezbollah and Israel swap threats and strikes across Lebanon’s border
item.description: Iran-linked group reiterates defiance; Israeli defence minister threatens to ‘burn all of Lebanon'.

item.title: Iraqi president names Shia bloc candidate Ali al-Zaidi as PM-designate
item.description: Choice of al-Zaidi breaks a months-long deadlock after Trump opposed appointment of pro-Iran former PM al-Maliki.

item.title: Ceasefire at risk as Pakistan and Afghanistan report cross-border attacks
item.description: The strikes were the first since the two agreed to halt the violence at peace talks last month.

item.title: Suspected pirates steer cargo vessel towards Somalia
item.description: Hijacking reported as maritime traffic is diverted towards Africa while Strait of Hormuz is essentially closed.

item.title: Will the Iran war push millions back into poverty?
item.description: US-Israel war on Iran drives up fuel and food costs, putting 32.5 million people at risk of poverty worldwide.

item.title: Iran offers Hormuz deal without nuclear talks, as it seeks broader buy-in
item.description: Tehran widens diplomacy to regional and global players while indirect US talks remain uncertain.

item.title: Germany’s Merz says US has no strategy in Iran war
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the US has no clear exit strategy with their war on Iran.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel’s deadly attacks amid ceasefire breaches
item.description: Israeli airstrikes hit southern Lebanon as ceasefire falters, killing at least 14 and forcing new displacement.

item.title: NPT summit: Can nuclear pact survive US-Israel war on Iran?
item.description: Analysts say a review conference is unlikely to halt nuclear powers from continuing to flout the treaty's rules.

item.title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
item.description: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.
